calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Joe Vickstein. Petitioner Pete Isidor Mondrago'n was sworn and examined. The Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Jeffrey Mondragon. Decree signed in open court.
